Text.Page:
The Eldritch Academy Grounds were actually designed to protect themselves. We use nearby creatures as guardians. It gives them purpose, you see, and we treat them well.

The scarecrows in the yard are supposed to defend the gardens, but now they're destroying them instead. They're even attacking us, and after all we've done for them!

Would you be so kind as to go investigate? Perhaps you'll determine what's causing this lunacy.

The scarecrows are all broken?

Sigh...what do I do now?

Thanks for your help. I'm just at a loss...
